description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and mirror. In the test stage add a Test job that uses the crystallang/crystal Docker image, runs cd "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}", then shards install, then crystal spec -s -t. In the mirror stage add a Mirror to gh job that uses the haffmans/git-mirror:latest image and runs git-mirror "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}" git@github.com:${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
